pre_survey.intro_text: A few quick questions before we start. There are no right or wrong answers; your picks just help make what comes next feel more like your life.

questions.title: How do you identify?
questions.description: Optional. Used only to personalize language and labels.

options.text: He / Him
She / Her
They / Them
Prefer not to say

questions.title: Which best describes where you're at right now?
questions.description: Optional. Helps match examples to your world.

options.text: Middle school
High school
College or university
Working or done with school

questions.title: What do you actually enjoy doing?
questions.description: Pick everything that fits, even a little.

options.text: Gaming: video games, board games, card games
Sports or physical activity
Creating stuff: art, music, writing, video
Hanging out or doing things with friends
Building, coding, or making things work
Puzzles, strategy, or planning ahead
Watching shows, reading, or just chilling
Honestly not sure / changes all the time

questions.title: When something clicks for you, it's usually because...
questions.description: Pick up to two. Think about school, games, sports, whatever comes to mind.

options.text: There's a challenge or something to beat
You're figuring it out with other people
You get to experiment and try things your way
The steps are clear and it actually makes sense
There's a story or bigger picture pulling you in
You're planning or solving something complex
It's just straight to the point, no fluff

questions.title: What kind of vibe do you prefer?
questions.description: Pick one. No wrong answer, just what feels more like you.

options.text: Surprise me: I like when things are unpredictable
Keep it clear: I like knowing what to expect
Somewhere in between

questions.title: What tone feels most natural to you?
questions.description: This shapes how questions and scenarios are phrased.

options.text: Casual and a bit funny, keep it light
Friendly but straightforward, no jokes needed
Serious and to the point, just get on with it

questions.title: Where should the scenarios take place?
questions.description: Pick up to two. The situations will be set here so they actually feel relevant.

options.text: School or class
A job or work
Sports or a team
Hobbies
With friends or socially
Online: games, content, communities
Doesn't matter: use anything

profile_logic.cluster_weighting: Sum weights from all selections per cluster. Dominant cluster(s) determine the main style and type of questions in the interview.
profile_logic.secondary_tone_adjustment: Risk/Novelty appetite adjusts challenge level and phrasing without changing cluster.
profile_logic.ui_personalization: Gender/pronouns and age group adjust labels and UI text; passed in profile for personalization.
profile_logic.blending_rule: If multiple clusters have similar weights, blend scenario metaphors proportionally in the main interview (e.g., 70% dominant, 30% secondary).
